notes: Constructed wordplay pack for the 2026-06-19 daily run (second run this date — first used Homophones + Puns). Mechanics: 5 Anagrams + 5 Hidden Words. Hidden Words is new to this run's rotation; all pairs are fresh (not in wordplay-001, -2026-06-17, -2026-06-18, or -2026-06-19 packs). Hidden Words clues use 'Puns, Quotes & Idioms' subcategory (the closest valid subcat; Hidden Words is not yet in subcategories.json — flag for human to add if desired). Anagram: scramble word sits naturally in a complete sentence whose meaning the answer completes — no fill-in-the-blank, no call-out, no near-synonym pairs. Hidden Words: answer hides as consecutive letters in a carrier word within the clue — never visually marked.
